description: Daemon boots via `MOCK_MODE=true npm start` and listens on the configured port
steps: confirm it logs a listening port and does not exit

description: GET /api/state returns valid JSON with the full panels contract in mock mode
steps: assert top-level keys generatedAt, mockMode:true, market, featuredSymbol, panels
assert panels has all 12 slots each shaped {data,fetchedAt,stale,error}

description: MCP client speaks JSON-RPC over StreamableHTTP: initialize handshake then tools/call, parsing content[0].text
steps: confirm it sends Accept: application/json, text/event-stream
confirm it handles both SSE-framed and application/json responses
confirm both X-API-Key and Bearer auth headers are set

description: MCP client backs off on HTTP 429 / JSON-RPC -32000 and serves last cached value
steps: confirm exponential base 2s cap 60s with jitter
confirm cached value is served during backoff

description: MOCK_MODE serves realistic fixtures for all 12 tools built from the real tool output shapes
steps: confirm each of the 12 tools has a fixture
confirm unusualActivity fixture rows match the documented field shape (ticker,type,premium,volume,sentiment,score,tier,tierColor,flowDescription,vsOI)
confirm fixtures include aggregates/totals where the real tool returns them

description: Config loader reads config.json (apiKey, baseUrl, port, featuredTickers, screenerRotation, rotationSeconds), env overrides, sane defaults
steps: confirm missing config.json in non-mock mode fails with a clear message, not a crash

description: Market-hours module computes phase (premarket/open/afterhours/closed/weekend) in the configured timezone
steps: confirm weekend and after-4pm ET return closed/weekend

description: Poller is market-hours aware: fast pollers only run when open, earnings/econ refresh on a slow timer, featured-symbol tools re-pick each cycle
steps: confirm featuredSymbol is derived from top unusual-activity row with featuredTickers fallback
confirm closed state stops fast pollers but keeps last values

description: Panels are stale-marked when their last successful fetch exceeds 2x their interval
steps: confirm stale flag is computed per panel
confirm error slot is a short string or null, never a raw upstream message

description: Client shell loads /api/state on an interval and drives a panel registry without a build step
steps: open the served page in mock mode
confirm the client polls /api/state and updates panels

description: Flow-tape hero renders unusual-activity rows with sentiment color, tier, premium, ticker, and streams/updates on new data
steps: confirm the hero shows multiple flow rows
confirm premium and ticker are legible
confirm new rows animate in (respecting prefers-reduced-motion)

description: Vitals header renders market_stats (put/call, sentiment, largest trade) and the live clock + market phase
Sentiment gauge panel renders put/call ratios as a visual gauge
steps: confirm put_call_ratios panel renders a gauge/visual, not raw numbers only

description: Gamma panel renders gex_overview bias (LONG/SHORT gamma) and market summary
steps: confirm gexOverview panel shows bias and interpretation

description: Sector heatmap renders sector_flow as colored tiles
steps: confirm sectorFlow panel renders tiles colored by flow

description: IV-rank premium-seller watch renders iv_rank for the featured symbol
steps: confirm ivRank panel renders rank/percentile with rich/cheap read

description: Rotating feature card cycles screener/strategy/edge-xray/iv-rank on rotationSeconds
steps: confirm the main stage rotates between heavier panels

description: Featured deep-dive renders gex_ticker/edge_xray/strategy_ideas for the derived featured symbol
steps: confirm deep-dive shows the featured symbol's data

description: 'What's coming' ribbon renders earnings_flow + economic_calendar
steps: confirm a bottom ribbon lists upcoming earnings and econ events

description: Off-hours/closed state renders a graceful recap view instead of the live layout
steps: simulate closed market (mock or forced phase)
confirm the UI shows a closed/recap state, not a broken live view

description: Connection/error states: a failed panel shows an empty/error tile, stale panels dim, a disconnect shows a footer indicator
steps: force a panel error in mock

description: MOCK badge is visible when mockMode is true so screenshots are honestly labeled
steps: confirm a MOCK/DEMO badge shows in the footer or corner

description: Design tokens: all colors/spacing/type come from CSS custom properties in one tokens file; no raw hex scattered in panels
steps: grep panels for raw hex colors

description: Premium dark glassmorphism aesthetic: deep navy bg, translucent blurred panels, hairline borders, tasteful HSL semantic colors (no raw red/green)
steps: confirm dark bg with backdrop-filter blur panels
confirm semantic green/red are tasteful HSL not #f00/#0f0

description: Legible from 10 feet: large type, high contrast, glanceable color-first hierarchy
steps: confirm mood is conveyed by color before reading

description: Motion is restrained and honors prefers-reduced-motion
steps: confirm tape animates but other panels crossfade calmly

description: README documents Raspberry Pi kiosk setup (config, autostart, Chromium kiosk flags)
steps: confirm setup steps: copy config, npm install, start, Chromium --kiosk autostart

description: Nothing outside td-daddyboard/ is modified
steps: confirm all new/changed files are under td-daddyboard/
